title: A Key Freely Given
description: A dying innkeeper presses a key into your hand. Your selfless reputation convinced her that a stranger could be trusted with the future of her family.

options.title: Honor Her Trust
options.description: Deliver the key and protect what she left behind.

options.title: Open It Yourself
options.description: Trust is valuable because it creates opportunities no lock can prevent.

options.title: Share the Burden
options.description: Ask the village elders to witness the key's safe return.
